description: API + persistence: REST API for ideabox CRUD (`GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/ideabox`, `POST /api/ideabox/:id/discuss`, `POST /api/ideabox/:id/promote`, `POST /api/ideabox/:id/kill`). Markdown parser reads `ideabox.md` into structured JSON. WebSocket broadcast on ideabox state changes. File-based persistence in `ideabox.md` (source of truth) with parsed JSON cache in `.compose/data/ideabox-cache.json` for fast UI queries.
